zh.lifeSummary: 當John Baronet Cunningham於1500年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親Adam Cunningham21歲，母親Mrs Adam Cunningham20歲。他於1513年5月與Annabella Campbell of Loudon在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1564年12月1日在他的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Baronet Cunningham于1500年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾时，他的父亲Adam Cunningham21岁，母亲Mrs Adam Cunningham20岁。他于1513年5月与Annabella Campbell of Loudon在苏格兰艾斯爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1564年12月1日在他的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cunningham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the province of Cunningham in Ayrshire, first recorded in 1153 in the form Cunegan, a Celtic name of uncertain origin. The spellings in -ham, first recorded in 1180, and in -ynghame, first recorded in 1227, represent a gradual assimilation to the English placename element -ingham.

Irish: surname adopted from Gaelic Ó Cuinneagáin ‘descendant of Cuinneagán’, a personal name from a double diminutive of the Old Irish personal name Conn meaning ‘leader, chief’. This name is also adopted for Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin ‘descendant of Connagán’, from a diminutive of the personal name Conn.
History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Wernebald de Cunynghame, who was granted the manor of Cunningham by Hugh de Morville in the early 12th century.

variants.name: Cunigan
meanings: Altered form of Scottish or Irish   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Conahan
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Connachaín (see Cunningham ).

variants.name: Conaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Fergal.
Scottish (Lanarkshire and Renfrewshire) Irish (Donegal): from Ó Connacháin, a variant of Ó Connagáin, see Cunningham .

variants.name: Cuningham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cummingham
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Cunningham  .

variants.name: Cunnigham
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Donegal): variant of   Cunningham  .

nameMeanings.name: Baronet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Barnett
meanings: Transferred use of the surname (from an Old French diminutive of brun ‘brown’), in origin a nickname referring to brown colouring of hair, complexion, or clothing. As a female first name it may have been chosen in some cases with reference to the plant Sanguisorba minor, known as burnet, whose leaves are used for salad ( compare Sorrel and Fennel ).

en.lifeSummary: When John Baronet Cunningham was born in 1500, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Adam Cunningham, was 21 and his mother, Mrs Adam Cunningham, was 20. He married Annabella Campbell of Loudon in May 1513, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 1 December 1564, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Baronet Cunningham est né en 1500, à Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam Cunningham, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs Adam Cunningham, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Annabella Campbell of Loudon en mai 1513, à Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 décembre 1564, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Baronet Cunningham 1500 in Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Cunningham 21 und seine Mutter Mrs Adam Cunningham 20. Er hat im Mai 1513 in Ayrshire, Scotland Annabella Campbell of Loudon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Dezember 1564 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Baronet Cunningham è nato il nel 1500 nel Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam Cunningham, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Adam Cunningham, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Annabella Campbell of Loudon nel maggio 1513, nel Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 dicembre 1564, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Baronet Cunninghamが1500年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Adam Cunninghamは21歳，母Mrs Adam Cunninghamは20歳であった。1513年5月にスコットランドエイルシュアイアでAnnabella Campbell of Loudonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1564年12月1日に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Baronet Cunningham(이)가 1500년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Cunningham(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Adam Cunningham(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1513년 5월 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Annabella Campbell of Loudon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1564년 12월 1일 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Baronet Cunningham nasceu em 1500, em Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam Cunningham, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Adam Cunningham, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Annabella Campbell of Loudon em maio de 1513, em Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de dezembro de 1564, em sua cidade natal, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Baronet Cunningham родился в 1500 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam Cunningham было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs Adam Cunningham, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Annabella Campbell of Loudon май 1513 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 декабря 1564 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Baronet Cunningham nació en 1500, en Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Adam Cunningham, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mrs Adam Cunningham, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Annabella Campbell of Loudon en mayo de 1513, en Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de diciembre de 1564, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
